_comment: StackProfile snapshot gate lock (spec Gap 3). Digests are sha256 of the NORMALIZED deterministic-only scan JSON (faultline.tools.normalize_scan) of each pinned LOCAL clone at the pinned commit. Regenerate with `python -m faultline.tools.snapshot_gate --update`. Paths are machine-local pins (the corpus clones are not vendored); CI boxes without the clones skip the gate. days=3650 pins the git window to the full clone so digests do not rot as calendar time passes.

scan_config.llm: hard-off (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in child env; all LLM caches disabled)
